calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Removing Chris Zampach As Successor Trustee And Appointing Armand Russo As Successor Trstee Of The Charles Wohletz Irrevocable Special Needs Trust Dated March 22, 2001
Off Calendar Jul-24-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: John Fasesky appeared by zoom for Charles Wohletz (petitioner).

The court stated that it read the supplement, that it was helpful, that it answered some of the questions that were raised by the probate examiner and that it explained the thinking behind the removal of a deceased trustee. Mr. Fasesky stated that Mr. Russo is an acquaintance, that he is a retired nurse and currently a property manager of an apartment building, that he is qualified and that it would be in Mr. Wohletz' best interest. The court raised the issue of bond. Mr. Fasesky stated that he believes his client will waive bond, but he does not know if his client has the authority to do so. The First Amended Petition for Order Removing Judy Spain and Chris Zampach as Trustee and Appointing Armand Russo as Successor Trustee is under submission with the court's intent to grant.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported.
